text: Star_Vader is absolutely reeling in WillyT06! That gap has collapsed to a terrifying 15.0% of a lap.
What a stunning pass! Star_Vader snatches the lead from WillyT06 at the Speedway.
Look at that! WillyT06 has stolen the lead from Star_Vader at the Speedway!
Chequered flag at Speedway! The chequered flag falls, and WillyT06 takes the checkered to win the Street Race!
